initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom
JOIN molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT molecule_id 
    FROM atom 
    WHERE element = 'Cl'
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id 
    FROM atom 
    WHERE element = 'C' OR element = 'H' OR element = 'N' OR element = 'O' OR element = 'S' OR element = 'P' OR element = 'Cl'
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom
JOIN molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT molecule_id 
    FROM atom 
    WHERE element = 'Cl'
);

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom
JOIN molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom
JOIN molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id;
